DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT AYLSSA GUTNER-DAVIS, MOTION TO COMPEL PLTF'S TESTIMONY AT DEPO AND VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DISCO REQUESTS IS GRANTED IN PART. THE PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES-GENERAL, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE MOTION TO COMPEL THE PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION IS DENIED. THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $580.00 IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Defendant Aylssa Gutner-Davis' Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Defendant'S Discovery Requests; Motion For Order Deeming Requests Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARASH MOUSSAVIAN, TEL. NO. 695-4545 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Aylssa Gutner-Davis' Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendant's Discovery Requests; Motion For Order Deeming Requests Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions is Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $580.00. The sanctions are to be paid by December 31, 2014. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312.
Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg

Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Attendance And Testimony At Depo
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Timothy Schweigerdt, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendants and moving party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT AYLSSA GUTNER-DAVIS, Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Attendance And Testimony At Depo is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Terstominy At Depo And Verified Responsesto Disco Requests
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Marcolini, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.568.0742, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Timothy Schweigerdt, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendants and moving party, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT AYLSSA GUTNER-DAVIS, Motion To Compel Pltf'S Testimony At Depo And Verified Responses to Disco Requests is GRANTED in part. No opposition was filed. The plaintiff shall serve verified responses to Form Interrogatories-General, Set One and Request for Production of Documents, Set One within 10 days. The motion to compel the plaintiff to attend and testify at deposition is DENIED. It does not appear from the papers filed that the plaintiff has failed or refused to appear and testify at deposition. The defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $580.00 is GRANTED. Sanctions to be paid within 30 days. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
